active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE
active.notes: Win rate tracker deployed and resolving outcomes. First batch: 187 outcomes resolved (31.0% win, 25.7% loss, 43.3% neutral). Both engines writing to DB. Phase 2 (dashboard + macro filter) ready for approval.

active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — HARDENED: Watchdog + Cooldown 120s + Fixes
active.notes: 3 permanent fixes: (1) Cooldown optimized 300s→120s (2-min, smooth rotation, no dead windows), (2) Self-healing watchdog (3 silent cycles → auto-reset cooldowns + notify), (3) DEX scanner NoneType crash fixed. Whale-only signals confirmed flowing. 18+ alerts/cycle. Engine now fail-safe.

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement Plan (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (frozen + telegram-silent signals fixed, hardened with watchdog). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason's go-ahead: (2) Signal quality: Win rate dashboard + macro correlation filter, (3) New alpha sources: OKX/Bybit funding + order book + whale tracking, (4) Architecture: Event-driven + tiered cadence.
